evals.prompt: Set up the semantic SEO foundation for a new brand: a Shopify store selling single-origin coffee beans and home brewing gear at driftroast.com. Owner is a licensed Q-grader.
evals.expected_output: entity-profile.json with central_entity = specialty coffee (not the brand name), source_context with monetization + will_not_cover, core/outer boundary rule, personas, competitors; locked-facts.json seeded; every factual field provenance-tagged.

assertions.text: central_entity is the subject (specialty coffee), not 'driftroast'
assertions.name: entity_not_brand

assertions.text: core/outer boundary is stated as an applicable rule
assertions.name: boundary_rule

assertions.text: no bare numeric value lacks a provenance tag
assertions.name: no_naked_numbers

assertions.text: locked-facts.json only contains facts with a source (none invented)
assertions.name: locked_sourced

evals.prompt: Onboard this brand for SEO: acme-invoice.com, a B2B SaaS that automates accounts-payable invoice processing for mid-market finance teams.
evals.expected_output: entity-profile.json centered on AP/invoice automation with a will_not_cover list and monetization-derived core/outer split.
